markdown_formatted:
## Meeting Purpose

[Onboard Jacopo to Growthx tools, resources, and company expectations.](https://fathom.video/share/g3sfPyjo3wZWMFZuAbw1ZwFZp1BpxEWK?tab=summary&timestamp=162.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [**Daily Geekbot updates are mandatory** for team transparency across time zones.](https://fathom.video/share/g3sfPyjo3wZWMFZuAbw1ZwFZp1BpxEWK?tab=summary&timestamp=1394.0)
  - **Use the `#it-and-tools` Slack channel for all tool access requests,** tagging Alice or Yusuf.
  - [**Onboarding tasks are in two places:** the Notion handbook (source doc) and a linked Linear project (tracker).](https://fathom.video/share/g3sfPyjo3wZWMFZuAbw1ZwFZp1BpxEWK?tab=summary&timestamp=968.0)
  - [**The `team@growthxlabs.com` email is for shared tool logins** (e.g., ChatGPT); Jacopo's access was set up during the call.](https://fathom.video/share/g3sfPyjo3wZWMFZuAbw1ZwFZp1BpxEWK?tab=summary&timestamp=1571.0)

## Topics

### Company Expectations

  - [**Time Zone Overlap:** A minimum of 4 hours of overlap with Pacific Time is required.](https://fathom.video/share/g3sfPyjo3wZWMFZuAbw1ZwFZp1BpxEWK?tab=summary&timestamp=1394.0)
  - [**Daily Geekbot Updates:** Mandatory for team transparency.](https://fathom.video/share/g3sfPyjo3wZWMFZuAbw1ZwFZp1BpxEWK?tab=summary&timestamp=1394.0)
      - [Jacopo is added to the EPD (Engineering & Product Development) Geekbot.](https://fathom.video/share/g3sfPyjo3wZWMFZuAbw1ZwFZp1BpxEWK?tab=summary&timestamp=353.0)
      - Respond to the daily Slack prompt → updates post to the `#epd` channel.
  - [**PTO Policy:** Unlimited PTO with no approval needed.](https://fathom.video/share/g3sfPyjo3wZWMFZuAbw1ZwFZp1BpxEWK?tab=summary&timestamp=1428.0)
      - [Process: Block time on the calendar and add your manager and team.](https://fathom.video/share/g3sfPyjo3wZWMFZuAbw1ZwFZp1BpxEWK?tab=summary&timestamp=1428.0)
  - [**Employee Referral Program:**](https://fathom.video/share/g3sfPyjo3wZWMFZuAbw1ZwFZp1BpxEWK?tab=summary&timestamp=1483.0)
      - [Engineering roles: up to $10,000 bonus.](https://fathom.video/share/g3sfPyjo3wZWMFZuAbw1ZwFZp1BpxEWK?tab=summary&timestamp=1483.0)
      - [Non-engineering roles: up to $5,000 bonus.](https://fathom.video/share/g3sfPyjo3wZWMFZuAbw1ZwFZp1BpxEWK?tab=summary&timestamp=1483.0)
      - [Payout is contingent on the hire staying for 6 months.](https://fathom.video/share/g3sfPyjo3wZWMFZuAbw1ZwFZp1BpxEWK?tab=summary&timestamp=1483.0)

### Onboarding Resources & Meetings

  - [**Onboarding Plan:** Located in Notion at `Handbook > Onboarding Resources > Company-Wide Onboarding`.](https://fathom.video/share/g3sfPyjo3wZWMFZuAbw1ZwFZp1BpxEWK?tab=summary&timestamp=968.0)
  - [**Task Tracking:** The Notion plan is duplicated as a Linear project for tracking.](https://fathom.video/share/g3sfPyjo3wZWMFZuAbw1ZwFZp1BpxEWK?tab=summary&timestamp=1241.0)
      - [Tasks are tagged by due date (`Day 1`, `Week 1`).](https://fathom.video/share/g3sfPyjo3wZWMFZuAbw1ZwFZp1BpxEWK?tab=summary&timestamp=1330.0)
      - [Click the Notion link within a Linear issue to access the task's content.](https://fathom.video/share/g3sfPyjo3wZWMFZuAbw1ZwFZp1BpxEWK?tab=summary&timestamp=1306.0)
  - [**Key Onboarding Meetings:**](https://fathom.video/share/g3sfPyjo3wZWMFZuAbw1ZwFZp1BpxEWK?tab=summary&timestamp=1097.0)
      - [**Manager (Daniel):** In-person meeting this week.](https://fathom.video/share/g3sfPyjo3wZWMFZuAbw1ZwFZp1BpxEWK?tab=summary&timestamp=1040.0)
      - [**Onboarding Buddy:** Daniel will assign a peer for tool/process support.](https://fathom.video/share/g3sfPyjo3wZWMFZuAbw1ZwFZp1BpxEWK?tab=summary&timestamp=1040.0)
      - [**Kyle:** Rescheduled to **Nov 21st, 9:30 AM PT** (Jacopo's conflict).](https://fathom.video/share/g3sfPyjo3wZWMFZuAbw1ZwFZp1BpxEWK?tab=summary&timestamp=1110.0)
      - [**Marcel (CEO):** Scheduled for **Nov 26th, 9:30 AM PT**.](https://fathom.video/share/g3sfPyjo3wZWMFZuAbw1ZwFZp1BpxEWK?tab=summary&timestamp=1197.0)
  - [**Bi-weekly All-Hands:** Next meeting is next Tuesday.](https://fathom.video/share/g3sfPyjo3wZWMFZuAbw1ZwFZp1BpxEWK?tab=summary&timestamp=1519.0)
      - [Agenda: Team intros, business updates, product updates.](https://fathom.video/share/g3sfPyjo3wZWMFZuAbw1ZwFZp1BpxEWK?tab=summary&timestamp=1534.0)
      - [Jacopo will introduce himself (name, location, fun fact).](https://fathom.video/share/g3sfPyjo3wZWMFZuAbw1ZwFZp1BpxEWK?tab=summary&timestamp=1534.0)

### Core Tools & Workflows

  - [**Slack:** Primary communication tool (internal & external channels).](https://fathom.video/share/g3sfPyjo3wZWMFZuAbw1ZwFZp1BpxEWK?tab=summary&timestamp=290.0)
  - [**Linear:** Project management for tasks, issues, and IT tickets.](https://fathom.video/share/g3sfPyjo3wZWMFZuAbw1ZwFZp1BpxEWK?tab=summary&timestamp=446.0)
      - [**Issue Creation:** Use the `/linear` Slack command for a shortcut.](https://fathom.video/share/g3sfPyjo3wZWMFZuAbw1ZwFZp1BpxEWK?tab=summary&timestamp=589.0)
      - [**Notifications:** Linear comments do not reliably notify users; use Slack for direct pings.](https://fathom.video/share/g3sfPyjo3wZWMFZuAbw1ZwFZp1BpxEWK?tab=summary&timestamp=799.0)
  - [**Notion:** Central knowledge base for docs, SOPs, and client workspaces.](https://fathom.video/share/g3sfPyjo3wZWMFZuAbw1ZwFZp1BpxEWK?tab=summary&timestamp=670.0)
  - [**Loom:** Screen recording for process documentation and tutorials.](https://fathom.video/share/g3sfPyjo3wZWMFZuAbw1ZwFZp1BpxEWK?tab=summary&timestamp=796.0)
  - [**OnePassword:** Password manager.](https://fathom.video/share/g3sfPyjo3wZWMFZuAbw1ZwFZp1BpxEWK?tab=summary&timestamp=805.0)
      - [Jacopo was granted access to the shared vault during the call.](https://fathom.video/share/g3sfPyjo3wZWMFZuAbw1ZwFZp1BpxEWK?tab=summary&timestamp=799.0)
  - [**`team@growthxlabs.com`:** Shared email for logging into company tools.](https://fathom.video/share/g3sfPyjo3wZWMFZuAbw1ZwFZp1BpxEWK?tab=summary&timestamp=1571.0)
      - [Jacopo's access was configured during the call.](https://fathom.video/share/g3sfPyjo3wZWMFZuAbw1ZwFZp1BpxEWK?tab=summary&timestamp=1571.0)

## Next Steps

  - [**Jacopo:**](https://fathom.video/share/g3sfPyjo3wZWMFZuAbw1ZwFZp1BpxEWK?tab=summary&timestamp=1003.0)
      - [Complete `Day 1` onboarding tasks in the Linear project.](https://fathom.video/share/g3sfPyjo3wZWMFZuAbw1ZwFZp1BpxEWK?tab=summary&timestamp=1247.0)
      - [Review the Notion onboarding handbook.](https://fathom.video/share/g3sfPyjo3wZWMFZuAbw1ZwFZp1BpxEWK?tab=summary&timestamp=968.0)
      - [Attend rescheduled meetings with Kyle (Nov 21) and Marcel (Nov 26).](https://fathom.video/share/g3sfPyjo3wZWMFZuAbw1ZwFZp1BpxEWK?tab=summary&timestamp=1110.0)
      - [Prepare a brief intro for the next bi-weekly All-Hands.](https://fathom.video/share/g3sfPyjo3wZWMFZuAbw1ZwFZp1BpxEWK?tab=summary&timestamp=1519.0)
  - [**Alice:**](https://fathom.video/share/g3sfPyjo3wZWMFZuAbw1ZwFZp1BpxEWK?tab=summary&timestamp=1116.0)
      - [Reschedule the meeting with Kyle for Nov 21st.](https://fathom.video/share/g3sfPyjo3wZWMFZuAbw1ZwFZp1BpxEWK?tab=summary&timestamp=1110.0)
      - [Investigate why Linear comment notifications failed.](https://fathom.video/share/g3sfPyjo3wZWMFZuAbw1ZwFZp1BpxEWK?tab=summary&timestamp=799.0)
